data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the ability to block PHI-capable integrations without an active BAA. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete checks or records that demonstrate this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but there are no specific validations or API reads presented to confirm that the system can indeed block such integrations, indicating a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to block PHI-capable integrations without an active BAA.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for blocking PHI-capable integrations
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to block PHI-capable integrations without an active BAA.
